title: Integration Logicals
text: Integration Logicals Uniface uses the following logicals to control how it connects with the JavaVirtual Machine, email servers, and the Sentinel Cloud Server. Table 1. Uniface Logicals Logical Description More Information JVM_OPTIONS Set the options for the Java Virtual Machine for XML transformations XMLTRANSFORM NTLM_INITIAL_RESPONSE Specify how the initial message from the client is sent to an SMTP server via the AUTH NTLM security driver. SMTP AUTH NTLM Security Driver SMTP SSPI Security Driver UHTTP_DEF_AUTH Set the default authentication to be used by web server when processing UHTTP SEND operations Authentication with UHTTP SEND UHTTP_WPOST_FORM On Windows platforms only, determines whether a default Content-Type header is added to POST requests. If set to T , a default Content-Type header is added. SEND ULIC_TIMEOUT Set a timeout on Uniface License Management utility (ULIC) when connecting to the Sentinel Cloud Server to activate or return a Sentinel cloud license. By default this is set to 2 minutes. Uniface License Management Utility (ulic) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
